recommendations.title: Return of the Tooth Fairy
recommendations.overview: The Tooth Fairy is back. 15 years after the events of the first movie, Corey, now grown up but mentally scarred has gone to a class reunion. However, the Tooth Fairy is back, and this time - You better have flossed properly.

recommendations.title: Mad Mom

recommendations.title: The Little Prince

recommendations.title: Flow
recommendations.overview: A solitary cat, displaced by a great flood, finds refuge on a boat with various species and must navigate the challenges of adapting to a transformed world together.

recommendations.title: Charm City Kings

recommendations.title: The Gruffalo
recommendations.overview: The magical tale of a mouse who sets foot on a woodland adventure in search of a nut. Encountering predators who all wish to eat him - Fox, Owl and Snake - the brave mouse creates a terrifying, imaginary monster to frighten them away. But what will t

recommendations.title: Ernest & Celestine
recommendations.overview: Celestine is a little mouse trying to avoid a dental career while Ernest is a big bear craving an artistic outlet. When Celestine meets Ernest, they overcome their natural enmity by forging a life of crime together.
recommendations.director: Vincent Patar, Benjamin Renner, Stéphane Aubier

recommendations.title: Steamboat Willie
recommendations.overview: Mickey Mouse, piloting a steamboat, delights his passenger, Minnie Mouse, by making musical instruments out of the menagerie on deck.

recommendations.director: Clyde Geronimi, Hamilton Luske, Wilfred Jackson
